docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $575.00 FILED BY MORGAN, GWENDOLYN AS TO DEFENDANT ROBINSON, FRANK N. JR. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-30-2000 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ROBINSON, FRANK N. JR.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MORGAN, GWENDOLYN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROBINSON, FRANK N. JR. $575.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $635.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO DEFT ROBINSON FRANK RETURNED BY THE POST NO OFFICE. NO REASON GIVEN.
CORRESPONDENCE FROM THE PLTF RE ADDITIONAL COSTS. FILED.
